creator: lq@et-toile.com
text:
For info, I rollbacked the MDEV-24393 on 10.5.12 but the crash still happens.
And on all my mariadb servers running 10.5.11 never had the issue, but on the 3 servers I upgraded to 10.5.12 I have the issue, so it looks like another patch from the 10.5.11 to the 10.5.12.
